title: NuGet.org serving invalid/corrupt package data (non-object JSON or corrupt nupkg)
error_pattern: The content at 'https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/...' is not a valid JSON object. The JSON document is not an object. / Failed to download package '...' from 'https://api.nuget.org/...'. The nupkg at '...' is not valid. Central Directory corrupt.

occurrences.job: Tests / Polyglot SDK Validation / Java SDK Validation
